layman_headline: Extreme Fear grips the market — no clean entry exists right now, patience is the trade.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' mode with a score of 25/100, and Bitcoin dominance at 56.8% is crushing altcoins. Every swing candidate on the watchlist has serious problems: some have already run up too much (ONDO +26%, LDO +18%), others are in freefall with strongly bearish charts (BONK, NIGHT), and the DEXE data is contradictory and unreliable. When the market is this fearful and alt-hostile, the best move is to sit on cash and wait for a cleaner setup.
layman_action: Do nothing this cycle. Keep your capital safe and wait for a higher-quality entry where technicals and momentum align. Fear markets reward patience.
expert_reasoning: Systematic review of all 9 candidates reveals no actionable setup. DEXE has deeply contradictory signals — the price field says $9.44 but chart analysis references $36.27, the 7d change is -77% yet RSI reads 71 overbought; this data is unreliable and untradeable. BONK has the most oversold RSI (31) but its chart bias is -2.0 (strongly bearish) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — catching this falling knife has no defined support level. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI 59 and +17.6% weekly gain mean the easy money has been made; risk/reward is only 0.38x to resistance. ONDO is similarly extended at +26% weekly with 0.38x R/R. ETH at RSI 39 with bearish structure and only 1.41x R/R doesn't justify the risk in this environment. High BTC dominance (56.8%) creates persistent headwinds for all altcoin positions.
risk_factors: Entering any alt position during 56.8% BTC dominance and Extreme Fear risks further drawdown as capital flows to BTC
All oversold candidates (BONK, NIGHT, MON) have bearish chart structures with no confirmed reversal signals
Extended candidates (ONDO, LDO) offer poor risk/reward ratios (0.38x) near resistance
watch_list: LDO — if it pulls back to $0.33-0.35 range while maintaining bullish chart structure, could offer a proper entry with better R/R
ETH — watch for RSI to drop below 30 or a bullish reversal candle pattern at $1,800 support for a high-conviction bounce trade
Fear & Greed Index — a move above 30 would signal improving sentiment and better conditions for alt entries
market_context: The market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with BTC dominance at 56.8%, creating a hostile environment for altcoins. Bitcoin itself is showing relative strength (+2.6% weekly) but alts are getting crushed, making this a capital preservation phase.
context_banner: Extreme Fear with high BTC dominance — no altcoin setup meets minimum quality standards; disciplined patience protects capital.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 with flat trend signals continued risk-off conditions — historically reliable signal (67% win rate) suggests waiting for improvement before entering alts.

Most reliable signal (83% win rate): no candidate has RSI below 30 with a bullish chart structure — the oversold coins (BONK 31, MON 38, NIGHT 39) all have bearish bias scores, negating the RSI signal.

LDO's Three White Soldiers (+0.85 bias) is the strongest bullish pattern but risk/reward of 0.38x to resistance makes entry unattractive; BONK's Three Black Crows (-2.0 bias) warns against catching the knife.
Crypto market breakout narrative tied to AI trade cooling could benefit BTC but high dominance means alts won't participate equally — no alt-specific catalyst identified.
The $1.2B options wall breakdown moved Bitcoin, confirming BTC-centric momentum that reinforces the alt-unfriendly dominance environment.
